---
title: "About me"
title-block-banner: "#2B3450"
---

![](files/profile.webp){width=250px .rounded-circle}

I’m Kiki Kuijjer,

I help people and organisations connect audiences with research, collections, and cultural heritage through digital tools and communication.

I work in [Digital Scholarship](https://library.soton.ac.uk/digital-scholarship) at the University of Southampton, focusing on 2D digitisation and helping people connect with library collections. I also manage digital engagement for the [Ocean Decade Heritage Network](https://www.oceandecadeheritage.org/), supporting efforts to better integrate ocean heritage into the [UN Ocean Decade](https://oceandecade.org/).

As a freelancer, I offer consultancy, social media support, website management, and science communication services.

On my [blog](https://ek-ku.github.io/blog/blog.html), I write about digital tools, research communication, and the intersections between culture, science, and the sea.

[Download CV](files/CV_EKKUIJJER.pdf){.btn .btn-primary .cta-btn}
